title: DORA raw event (v1)
description: Raw fact emitted by the platform — pipeline_run | deployment. Aggregated metrics (Deployment Frequency, Lead Time for Changes, Change Failure Rate, MTTR) are derived downstream from these events; they are NOT properties of a single event.

event_id.description: Stable UUIDv7 generated at emission time. The MTTR aggregator joins on this id via recovered_from_failure_id.

actor.description: GitHub username or service account — answers WHO.

work_id.description: Links the event to its originating ticket — answers WHY.

change_summary.description: Human-readable summary — answers WHAT (with event_type + service + commit_sha).

source.description: Where the event was emitted. CI events have additional required fields.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions workflow run id (required when source: ci).

source_url.description: Link to the workflow run (required when source: ci).

commit_authored_at.description: ISO8601 UTC — when the commit was authored. Required on deployment events; downstream Lead Time = finished_at - commit_authored_at.

is_rework.description: On deployment events: true when this deploy recovers from a prior failed deploy. Aggregator computes MTTR from rework pairs.

recovered_from_failure_id.description: On rework deployment events: the event_id of the prior failed deployment this one recovers from.

labels.description: Optional free-form key/value labels (avoid putting load-bearing audit fields here).
